meaning: vt.赞扬,歌颂,称赞n.赞扬,赞美的话,赞美,荣耀,称赞
examples: He heaped praise on his team.
Praise is a great confidence booster.
That said, many praise her ability to connect with top advisors as well as large clients.
He went on to praise his accomplishments overseeing a decade of unprecedented economic growth in Turkey.
